message:
fix(fr-conformance): canonicalize HGETALL field order in live oracle comparator (br-frankenredis-zk9q)

HGETALL returns pairs in hash-backend iteration order — upstream uses
listpack-backed hashes that preserve insertion order for small hashes
and then switches to hashtable ordering; ours uses hashbrown's default
probe order. Both are RESP-compliant; the order is explicitly
unspecified in the Redis protocol. Extends live_oracle_frames_match
with a HGETALL-specific canonicalizer that sorts by field name before
comparing. core_hash now 137/137 pass (was 130/137 with hgetall_result
diverging on iteration order).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
